requirements: oak color vinyl, budget under $5 per sqft, matte finish, durable enough for kids and a robot vacuum
applied_rules: Rule 1: durability/warranty over price — rejected LF-201 (15yr) despite lower price
Rule 2: warm oak tone over lighter/sand oak — chose Honey Oak over Sand Oak at equal AC4/20yr durability
Rule 3: price is a filter not a driver — did not default to cheapest compliant option (LF-201)
